# FYXEN - Modern Premium Essentials Store
> FYXEN is a curated, high-end, and minimalist e-commerce store offering premium manufacturing, lifestyle, and household essentials. We build shopping experiences that prioritize absolute quality, complete transparency, and customer satisfaction.

## Main Sections
- `Home -> https://www.fyxen.in`: Featured collections, trust badges, and navigation.
- `Shop -> https://www.fyxen.in/shop`: Full product catalog with categories, filtering, and search.
- `About Us -> https://www.fyxen.in/about`: Our brand vision, operational details (Bytread International Pvt. Ltd.), and core values.
- `FAQ -> https://www.fyxen.in/faq`: Answers to frequently asked questions about shipping, returns, and support.
- `Contact -> https://www.fyxen.in/contact`: Customer support and correspondence center.
- `Track Order -> https://www.fyxen.in/track-order`: Order status tracking interface.

## Product Categories
- `Home Category -> https://www.fyxen.in/category/home`: Curated products under Home.
- `Electronics Category -> https://www.fyxen.in/category/electronics`: Curated products under Electronics.
- `Portable Printers Category -> https://www.fyxen.in/category/portable-printers`: Curated products under Portable Printers.
- `Mini Bluetooth Thermal Printer Category -> https://www.fyxen.in/category/mini-bluetooth-thermal-printer`: Curated products under Mini Bluetooth Thermal Printer.
- `Kitchen & Dining Category -> https://www.fyxen.in/category/kitchen-dining`: Curated products under Kitchen & Dining.
- `Kitchen Tools & Gadgets Category -> https://www.fyxen.in/category/kitchen-tools-gadgets`: Curated products under Kitchen Tools & Gadgets.
- `Oil Dispensers & Sprayers Category -> https://www.fyxen.in/category/oil-dispensers-sprayers`: Curated products under Oil Dispensers & Sprayers.

## Key Facts & Customer Policies
- **GST Invoice Support**: All orders come with official GST invoices issued under Bytread International Pvt. Ltd.
- **Shipping**: Quick nationwide delivery across India. Free shipping options available.
- **Returns & Refunds**: Hassle-free 7-day return policy for standard eligible products.
- **Secure Payments**: Fully integrated payment gateways with support for UPI, Cards, Net Banking, and Wallets.
- **Auto-PIN verification**: Pin code verification automatically fetches City and State details instantly.
